top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_attribute ha
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    WHERE attribute_id = (
        SELECT id 
        FROM attribute 
        WHERE attribute_name = 'strength'
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_attribute ha
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    WHERE attribute_id = (
        SELECT id 
        FROM attribute 
        WHERE attribute_name = 'strength'
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_attribute ha
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute ha2
    JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id
    WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'strength'
)
AND a.attribute_name = 'strength';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_attribute ha
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    WHERE attribute_id = (
        SELECT id 
        FROM attribute 
        WHERE attribute_name = 'strength'
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_attribute ha
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute ha2
    JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id
    WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'strength'
)
AND a.attribute_name = 'strength';

WITH strength_attr AS (
    SELECT id FROM attribute WHERE attribute_name = 'strength'
),
max_strength AS (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) AS max_val
    FROM hero_attribute
    WHERE attribute_id = (SELECT id FROM strength_attr)
)
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM hero_attribute ha
JOIN strength_attr sa ON ha.attribute_id = sa.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (SELECT max_val FROM max_strength);

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_attribute ha
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    WHERE attribute_id = (
        SELECT id 
        FROM attribute 
        WHERE attribute_name = 'strength'
    )
);
